div.head: The Minister in Nicaragua (Long) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Sir: With reference to the Department’s instruction No. 123 of February 19, 1937, transmitting to the Legation the text of a note for transmission to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Nicaragua, announcing the willingness of the Government of the United States to cooperate in the construction of the Nicaraguan section of the proposed Inter-American Highway, I have the honor to report that the note was transmitted under date of February 26, 1937, and to enclose copy and translation of the reply of the Minister for Foreign Affairs dated March 4,Not printed. expressing thanks for the offer of cooperation and confirming on behalf of the Nicaraguan Government the points contained in the note of February 26, 1937.
